data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the conditional visibility feature, which is stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not include any specific details or examples demonstrating that this feature is implemented or functioning as required. The absence of concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to conditional visibility indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of implementation for conditional visibility (show only if X is true).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
